prompt: A realistic smartphone screenshot mockup of a Chinese short-video livestream shopping interface in dark mode, shown on a charcoal black app background. At the top right of the overall canvas, place a rounded dark chat bubble containing the Chinese text {argument name="request text" default="帮我生成一张马斯克在带货老干妈的抖音直播间截图"}, with 2 small interface icons to its right for copy and edit. In the lower left area, display a tall iPhone-style livestream screen with a black bezel, rounded corners, and the time 20:30. The livestream is from Lao Gan Ma’s official flagship store, with a Chinese profile name line, a blue verification badge, a red follow button, and a top status row showing 3 circular avatars, a viewer count of 10万+, a close icon, and a button labeled 更多直播. Add ranking text near the top such as 带货总榜第1名 and 人气第1名. The main video shows {argument name="host identity" default="Elon Musk"} in a dim warm studio resembling a premium product livestream set, wearing a black shirt, holding a large jar of Lao Gan Ma chili sauce in his right hand and pointing at it with his left hand. His face is intentionally blurred with a rectangular mosaic blur. Behind him, include a glowing red-orange neon sign reading 老干妈 / LAO GAN MA / 国民辣酱, shelves with several sauce jars, a framed portrait logo, and a dark leafy plant on the right. Overlay typical livestream UI elements: on the left side, 2 floating gift/comment callouts with usernames and counts x66 and x88; below them a purple pill showing 35 and 加入了直播间. Add a scrolling comment area with 5 visible chat lines, including Chinese usernames and one line from {argument name="comment name" default="Elon Musk"} saying in English, "It's awesome! Very delicious!" followed by a Chinese line meaning he buys it every day. At the upper right of the video area, add a pink-red promo banner mentioning 抖音618好物节 and 618元消费券. In the lower right, place a product card with a hot-sale label 热卖x9999+, showing 3 jars of Lao Gan Ma and a bowl of chili condiment, product title text for 老干妈 风味豆豉油辣椒 280g*3瓶, small guarantee tags, and a large price ¥39.9 with a red purchase button. At the bottom of the phone screen, include 5 navigation/action areas: an edit-style button on the left, a text input hint, a shopping cart icon, a heart/gift icon pair, and a share arrow icon. Overall style: ultra-realistic app screenshot, believable Chinese ecommerce livestream UI, high detail, cinematic warm lighting in the video feed, clean modern mobile interface, visually convincing social commerce capture.
translatedPrompt: 一张深色模式下中国短视频直播带货界面的逼真手机截图模型，背景为炭黑色。在整体画布的右上角，放置一个圆角深色聊天气泡，其中包含中文文本 {argument name="request text" default="帮我生成一张马斯克在带货老干妈的抖音直播间截图"}，其右侧带有 2 个用于复制和编辑的小型界面图标。在左下角区域，显示一个带有黑色边框和圆角的 iPhone 风格直播屏幕，时间显示为 20:30。直播间来自老干妈官方旗舰店，包含中文个人资料名称行、蓝色认证徽章、红色关注按钮，以及顶部显示 3 个圆形头像、10 万+ 观看人数、关闭图标和“更多直播”按钮的状态栏。在顶部附近添加排名文本，如“带货总榜第 1 名”和“人气第 1 名”。主视频画面显示 {argument name="host identity" default="Elon Musk"} 在一个类似高端产品直播间的昏暗暖色调摄影棚中，身穿黑色衬衫，右手拿着一大瓶老干妈辣酱，左手指向它。他的脸部经过矩形马赛克模糊处理。在他身后，包含一个发着红橙色光的霓虹灯牌，写着“老干妈 / LAO GAN MA / 国民辣酱”，货架上摆放着几瓶辣酱，一个带框的肖像标志，右侧还有一株深色叶片植物。叠加典型的直播 UI 元素：在左侧，有 2 个带有用户名和 x66、x88 计数的悬浮礼物/评论气泡；下方是一个显示 35 和“加入了直播间”的紫色胶囊状图标。添加一个包含 5 行可见聊天记录的滚动评论区，其中包括中文用户名，以及一行来自 {argument name="comment name" default="Elon Musk"} 的英文评论：“It's awesome! Very delicious!”，随后跟着一行表示他每天都买的中文评论。在视频区域的右上角，添加一个粉红色促销横幅，提及“抖音 618 好物节”和“618 元消费券”。在右下角，放置一个带有“热卖 x9999+”标签的产品卡片，展示 3 瓶老干妈和一碗辣椒调料，产品标题为“老干妈 风味豆豉油辣椒 280g*3 瓶”，带有小型保障标签，以及一个 ¥39.9 的大价格和红色购买按钮。在手机屏幕底部，包含 5 个导航/操作区域：左侧的编辑风格按钮、文本输入提示、购物车图标、心形/礼物图标对，以及分享箭头图标。整体风格：超逼真的 App 截图，可信的中国电商直播 UI，高细节，视频流中电影般的暖色调灯光，简洁现代的移动界面，视觉上令人信服的社交电商截图。

breakdown.creativeCore: 伪造抖音老干妈直播间截图：生成一张逼真的中国直播带货 App 截图，展示名人主播售卖老干妈的场景，适用于社交媒体模型及病毒式讽刺图片创作。
breakdown.subject: 界面
breakdown.text: 包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 直播带货界面、社交电商、移动端商品页

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: callout]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, premium, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
